name: type:bug
description: Incorrect behavior, crash, or data-integrity defect

name: type:feature
description: User-facing capability

name: type:refactor
description: Internal design change without intended user-facing behavior change

name: type:chore
description: Maintenance, dependency, tooling, or repository task

name: type:docs
description: Documentation-only work

name: type:spike
description: Time-boxed research or decision work

name: priority:01-now
description: Execute first; currently highest-impact or blocking work

name: priority:02-next
description: Execute after priority 01; important near-term work

name: priority:03-soon
description: Normal planned work after 01 and 02

name: priority:04-later
description: Valid but low-urgency work

name: priority:05-icebox
description: Parked idea or optional work with no near-term execution intent

name: area:editor
description: Workout editor and active logging

name: area:workouts
description: Workout history and workout management

name: area:data
description: Database, repositories, mappings, and migrations

name: area:parser
description: Workout text parsing and normalization

name: area:stats
description: Statistics, calculations, and charts

name: area:timer
description: Workout or rest timer behavior

name: area:import-export
description: Import, export, backup, and restore

name: area:settings
description: User settings and categories

name: area:build
description: Build, CI, packaging, and release

name: area:governance
description: Issues, pull requests, documentation, and project management

name: status:ideas
description: Workflow state: raw idea, unclear item, or unclassified ticket

name: status:planned
description: Workflow state: valid ticket that is not executable yet

name: status:ready
description: Workflow state: specified and ready to enter implementation

name: status:in-progress
description: Workflow state: implementation is active

name: status:needs-manual-review
description: Workflow state: needs manual review, runtime validation, or final confirmation

name: status:completed
description: Workflow state: completed, merged, closed, or otherwise finished

name: flag:blocked
description: Cannot progress because of a dependency; link the blocker in the issue

name: flag:decision-needed
description: Needs a product, architecture, or scope decision before progress

name: risk:data-migration
description: May change or migrate persisted user data

name: risk:breaking-change
description: May break compatibility or existing behavior

name: risk:performance
description: Requires performance measurement or has performance risk

name: risk:privacy
description: Touches private data or privacy behavior
